title: Johns Hopkins University Generative AI Guidance Crawl Report
summary: This limited staged run captures the public Teaching @ JHU generative AI guidance hub. Approved claims cover the existence and scope of the guidance hub, divisional-guidance caveats, teaching-strategy guidance, instructional use cases, ethical implementation concerns, and the presence of FERPA/HIPAA/data ownership topics. Several deeper JHU pages currently return JavaScript/cookie challenges from this environment and are not used for approved claims.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Coverage is limited to the Teaching @ JHU guidance hub because several deeper official JHU pages currently return JavaScript/cookie challenges from this environment and were not bypassed.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
